name: cc-usage-guard
description: Pause-at-limit guard for Claude Code. A statusLine sensor records 5h + weekly rate-limit usage; PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks watch it and, when a window crosses its threshold, inject a STOP that pauses cleanly and schedules a one-shot CronCreate auto-resume at reset. Per-session debounced. Claude Code only (statusLine + hooks).
